auth.label: Webhook Key
auth.description: Paste the `key` query value from the WeCom bot webhook URL. Create the group bot and copy its webhook URL from the official config guide: https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/91770 . The full webhook URL is also accepted.

actions.name: send_image_message
actions.description: Send an image message through the WeCom bot webhook.

base64.description: The base64-encoded image bytes. The raw image must be a JPG or PNG no larger than 2 MB.

md5.description: The MD5 digest of the raw image bytes before base64 encoding.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WeCom image message.

errcode.description: The WeCom response code. `0` means success.

outputSchema.description: The normalized WeCom bot send result.

actions.name: send_markdown_message
actions.description: Send a markdown message through the WeCom bot webhook.

content.description: The markdown content encoded as UTF-8.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WeCom markdown message.

errcode.description: The WeCom response code. `0` means success.

outputSchema.description: The normalized WeCom bot send result.

actions.name: send_markdown_v2_message
actions.description: Send a markdown_v2 message through the WeCom bot webhook.

content.description: The markdown_v2 content encoded as UTF-8. WeCom markdown_v2 does not support `@` mentions.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WeCom markdown_v2 message.

errcode.description: The WeCom response code. `0` means success.

outputSchema.description: The normalized WeCom bot send result.

actions.name: send_news_message
actions.description: Send a news message through the WeCom bot webhook.

title.description: The article title. Titles longer than 128 bytes are truncated by WeCom.

description.description: The optional article description. Descriptions longer than 512 bytes are truncated by WeCom.

url.description: The URL opened after the user clicks the article.

picurl.description: The optional JPG or PNG image URL shown for the article.

articles.description: The news articles to send. WeCom supports 1 to 8 articles per message.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WeCom news message.

errcode.description: The WeCom response code. `0` means success.

outputSchema.description: The normalized WeCom bot send result.

actions.name: send_text_message
actions.description: Send a text message through the WeCom bot webhook.

content.description: The text content. The value can include WeCom `<@userid>` mention syntax.

items.description: One WeCom user ID to mention, or `@all` to mention everyone.

mentionedList.description: Optional user IDs to mention explicitly.

items.description: One phone number to mention, or `@all` to mention everyone.

mentionedMobileList.description: Optional mobile numbers to mention explicitly.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WeCom text message.

errcode.description: The WeCom response code. `0` means success.

outputSchema.description: The normalized WeCom bot send result.
